overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective walk through a rainy, neon-lit dystopian city at night. The player navigates past industrial fencing, elevated highways with red neon lights, and crosses wet urban intersections while encountering scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rain-soaked fenced pathway beside industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the wet sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the walkway
industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding behind the fence
massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the scene
row of red neon lights mounted underneath the highway overpass
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and 06 signage visible on facade
tall street lamp casting warm orange light on the rain-soaked pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked industrial pathway bordered by chain-link fencing on the right. An elevated highway with distinctive red neon strip lights spans overhead in the distance, while a modern glass skyscraper rises through the haze on the left. The wet concrete reflects the orange glow of street lamps in the heavy rain.

events.description: turns left at the corner of the fenced industrial warehouse

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and continuing along the fenced perimeter toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching the intersection through the rain

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible through the fence near the approaching intersection
large illuminated advertising billboard mounted on a building

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the corner of the industrial complex, the camera continues along the fenced pathway. The chain-link fence and warehouse recede slightly to the right while the scene opens toward an intersection. A palm tree becomes visible through the fencing, and vehicle headlights approach through the rainy haze.

events.description: exits fenced walkway and enters open street intersection
turns right while crossing the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection, navigating around other pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wet black asphalt road surface reflecting street lights
white painted zebra crossing stripes on the road
building with large illuminated advertising screens
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the fenced industrial area into a wide open intersection. The camera crosses the rain-slicked asphalt, navigating around other pedestrians. Commercial buildings with bright billboards line the left side while traffic lights and street lamps illuminate the hazy night scene.

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues past commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the entrance of the checkered building

entered.detail: building facade with distinctive black and white checkered pattern and NO SECURITY signage
illuminated entrance to commercial establishment with overhang

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the commercial sidewalk on the far side of the intersection. The camera passes a distinctive building with a checkered pattern and NO SECURITY signage. Pedestrians walk along the wet pavement as neon signs and street lamps reflect off the rain-soaked surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded industrial corridor into the vibrant, rain-slicked heart of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins along a wet concrete pathway bordered by chain-link fencing, moving beneath the red neon glow of an elevated highway and the looming silhouette of a glass skyscraper. As the camera turns left at the corner of the industrial complex, the warehouses recede to reveal a palm tree and the approaching headlights of vehicles through the rainy haze. The scene then opens wide as the camera emerges from the fenced area to cross a sprawling intersection, navigating through pedestrians amidst bright billboards and glowing traffic lights. Finally, the movement continues along a commercial sidewalk, passing a checkered building with security signage while neon lights reflect off the saturated pavement.
